rationale: Re-assert both runs' `forall|i|` page_array ensures so z3 instantiates them, case-split on `i == index` (at idx, every Page field is pinned by the ensures — non-mapping fields equal pre's, mappings equals the input — and off-idx both runs equal pre), then close with Seq extensionality `=~=`. All non-page_array PageAllocator fields are directly `==` to pre_self_'s in both runs, so they chain automatically.
